raw_consumer_statement: Barclay credit company failed to request proof of the fraudulent charge from me the user. Barclay failed to obtain proof of authorization from the merchant. I cancelled services with the merchant XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. I have an email as proof. I was not able to cancel my account using the XXXX XXXX online portal. There is an option to cancel but due to predatory business practices you receive an error and instead of being able to cancel you must email the company and request assistance from a representative. Bench accounting does not receive phone calls even though a phone number is listed. On XXXX XXXX the merchant XXXX XXXX  notified me via email that they ceased operations due to financial trouble and told me to seek services elsewhere. My credit card was charged without my approval and consent as required on XXXX XXXX. Over XXXX months after I cancelled and over XXXX  months after they notified me they closed there business and ceased operations. They used my card without consent. I did not consent.
